query:
SELECT serviceType, planName, COUNT(*) as cnt, MIN(monthlyCost) as min_cost, MAX(monthlyCost) as max_cost
FROM services 
WHERE provider = 'TIAB'
GROUP BY serviceType, planName
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;
